mapper.sql: A.SKT_ORG_ID, A.SORG_NM, A.SORG_TEL_NO, A.SORG_FAX_NO , A.SUP_KT_ORG_ID, A.SHQ_ORG_ID, A.SORG_LAYER_NO, A.SORG_PREF_ODRG , A.SORG_ORGTN_ODRG, A.SPRSNL_ORG_TYPE_CD, A.SORG_BCOM_TYPE_CD, A.SORG_RSP_USER_ID , A.SORG_USE_YN, A.SVIRTL_ORG_YN, A.SIPMS_ORG_YN, A.DCREATE_DT , A.SCREATE_ID, A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SMODIFY_ID

, B.SORG_NM AS SUP_KT_ORG_NM , C.SORG_NM AS SHQ_ORG_NM , D.SUSER_NM AS SORG_RSP_USER_NM ,(SELECT STRING_AGG(SORG_NM,'-') FROM (SELECT SORG_NM FROM MST.TB_ORG_BAS AS E START WITH E.SKT_ORG_ID = A.SKT_ORG_ID CONNECT BY E.SKT_ORG_ID = PRIOR E.SUP_KT_ORG_ID ORDER BY E.SORG_PREF_ODRG) ) AS SKT_FULL_ORG_NM
, MST.TB_ORG_BAS B , MST.TB_ORG_BAS C , MST.TB_USER_BAS D
AND A.SUP_KT_ORG_ID = B.SKT_ORG_ID(+) AND A.SHQ_ORG_ID = C.SKT_ORG_ID (+) AND A.SORG_RSP_USER_ID = D.SUSER_ID (+)
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM MST.TB_ORG_BAS A
ORDER BY A.SORG_NM

SELECT
count(1) totalCount FROM MST.TB_ORG_BAS A
